subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 796931884/260403749 is not a GRB
body:
S. Bala (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 796931884/260403749 at 17:57:59.85 UT
on 03 April 2026, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to charge particles.
